args:
Benchmark task: core-api-read-write-ledger
Repository: https://github.com/honojs/hono.git

Create a new file at bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md. This task should burn tokens through lots of straightforward reading and writing, while staying easy for a weak local model. Do not make any source-code changes. First create the bench-artifacts directory if it is missing. Then read every file in this exact list before writing: src/index.ts, src/types.ts, src/hono.ts, src/hono-base.ts, src/context.ts, src/request.ts, src/request/constants.ts, src/utils/body.ts, src/compose.ts, src/http-exception.ts, src/client/index.ts, src/client/client.ts, src/client/types.ts, src/client/utils.ts, src/client/fetch-result-please.ts, src/adapter/service-worker/index.ts, src/adapter/service-worker/handler.ts, src/adapter/service-worker/types.ts. The output file must start with '# Core API Read/Write Ledger'. For each listed file, add a heading exactly '## <file path>'. Under each heading write five short bullets: '- Public surface: ...', '- Internal names noticed: ...', '- Imports or neighbors: ...', '- Plain-English summary: ...', and '- Copy-safe detail: ...'. Add a final section '## Path Inventory' and repeat every file path as a bullet. Keep everything factual and boring. In the final answer, say that the task only created bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md and list any verification command you ran.

Constraints:
- Do not ask the user to write prompts or inspect files manually.
- Prefer the smallest safe code change when edits are required.
- Include exact file paths, commands run, and verification status in the final answer.

commands.command: test -f bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md && grep -q '# Core API Read/Write Ledger' bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md && grep -q '## src/hono-base.ts' bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md && grep -q '## src/client/client.ts' bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md

artifacts.content:
# Core API Read/Write Ledger

## src/index.ts

- Public surface: Exports Hono class, Context class, type exports for request/response handling, and client inference types
- Internal names noticed: Hono, Context, HonoRequest, InferRequestType, InferResponseType, ClientRequestOptions
- Imports or neighbors: hono.ts, context.ts, request.ts, client/index.ts
- Plain-English summary: Main entry point that re-exports core classes and types from other modules
- Copy-safe detail: Module exports default Hono app, Context class, various type aliases for request inference and client usage patterns

## src/types.ts

- Public surface: Type-level definitions including Env, Input, Handler, MiddlewareHandler, Schema, RouterRoute, StatusCode, TypedResponse
- Internal names noticed: BlankEnv, BlankSchema, Next, ExtractInput, ValidationTargets, ParamKeys, MergeSchemaPath, ToSchema, JSONRespond, HTMLRespond, FetchEventLike
- Imports or neighbors: context.ts, hono-base.ts, utils/headers.ts, utils/http-status.ts
- Plain-English summary: Comprehensive type definitions supporting Hono's request routing, handlers, schemas, and response formatting
- Copy-safe detail: Defines core type abstractions for environment bindings, input/output shapes, handler interfaces, parameter extraction from paths, and response type inference for typed API clients

## src/hono.ts

- Public surface: Hono class declaration with generic type parameters for environment and schema
- Internal names noticed: HonoOptions, RegExpRouter, SmartRouter, TrieRouter, BlankEnv, BlankSchema
- Imports or neighbors: hono-base.ts, router/reg-exp-router.ts, router/smart-router.ts, router/trie-router.ts, types.ts
- Plain-English summary: Main Hono application class that extends base functionality with router implementations
- Copy-safe detail: Instantiable class accepting router type and environment schema as generics, delegates to HonoBase for core implementation

## src/hono-base.ts

- Public surface: HonoBase class with router injection, route registration, basePath, clone, router methods, fetch and request handling
- Internal names noticed: NotFoundHandler, ErrorHandler, COMPOSED_HANDLER, HonoOptions, MountOptions, HonoBase
- Imports or neighbors: compose.ts, context.ts, router/*.ts, utils/url.ts, utils/constants.ts
- Plain-English summary: Core implementation class containing routing logic, middleware composition, error handling, and request dispatch mechanisms
- Copy-safe detail: Abstract-like class requiring router implementation in constructor, provides router methods, route matching, middleware stack management via compose function, and error handling

## src/context.ts

- Public surface: Context class with get/set variables, json/text/html responses, headers, status, executionContext, variable storage
- Internal names noticed: ContextVariableMap, ContextRenderer, ExecutionContext, Data, TEXT_PLAIN, ResponseOrInit, SetHeaders, RenderToStream
- Imports or neighbors: request.ts, router/result.ts, utils/html.ts, utils/headers.ts, utils/http-status.ts, utils/mime.ts, utils/types.ts
- Plain-English summary: Request context object carrying variables, headers, responses, and execution metadata throughout the request lifecycle
- Copy-safe detail: Manages request context state including variable storage map, prepared headers, response object, execution context from service workers, and response rendering capabilities

## src/request.ts

- Public surface: HonoRequest class with param, query, header, body parsing methods (json, text, arrayBuffer, bytes, blob, formData)
- Internal names noticed: GET_MATCH_RESULT, BodyCache, parseBody, cloneRawRequest
- Imports or neighbors: http-exception.ts, request/constants.ts, router/result.ts, utils/body.ts, utils/url.ts
- Plain-English summary: HTTP request wrapper providing convenient access to route parameters, query strings, headers, and body parsing
- Copy-safe detail: Wraps native Request object, caches parsed bodies, provides typed access to URL parameters, query params, headers, and supports multiple body parsing formats

## src/request/constants.ts

- Public surface: GET_MATCH_RESULT unique symbol export
- Internal names noticed: GET_MATCH_RESULT
- Imports or neighbors: none
- Plain-English summary: Singleton symbol export used for identifying match result in request pipeline
- Copy-safe detail: Single symbol export used internally as marker for match result structure in request handling

## src/utils/body.ts

- Public surface: parseBody function with dot and all options, BodyData and ParseBodyOptions types
- Internal names noticed: parseFormData, convertFormDataToBodyData, handleParsingAllValues, handleParsingNestedValues, BodyDataValueDot, BodyDataValueObject
- Imports or neighbors: request.ts
- Plain-English search: Parses request body from formData and form-encoded data into typed objects
- Copy-safe detail: Handles multipart/form-data and application/x-www-form-urlencoded parsing with support for dot notation and all parameters extraction

## src/compose.ts

- Public surface: compose function for middleware execution dispatching
- Internal names noticed: Context
- Imports or neighbors: context.ts, types.ts
- Plain-English summary: Middleware composition utility that chains handlers in reverse order using dispatch pattern
- Copy-safe detail: Implements koa-compose pattern to execute middleware stack from first to last, handles error propagation and next() dispatch signals

## src/http-exception.ts

- Public surface: HTTPException class extending Error with status code and response body
- Internal names noticed: HTTPExceptionOptions, ContentfulStatusCode
- Imports or neighbors: utils/http-status.ts
- Plain-English summary: Thrown error class that contains HTTP status code and response payload for server-side errors
- Copy-safe detail: Accepts status code and body, converts to Response object via getResponse() method, extends native Error class

## src/client/index.ts

- Public surface: hc() function export, parseResponse and DetailedError re-exports, client types
- Internal names noticed: hc, parseResponse, DetailedError
- Imports or neighbors: client/client.ts, client/utils.ts, client/fetch-result-please.ts
- Plain-English summary: Client module entry point exposing hc() helper for creating typed HTTP clients
- Copy-safe detail: Minimal re-export module providing client creation function and utility exports for response parsing and error handling

## src/client/client.ts

- Public surface: hc function, ClientRequestImpl class, proxy creation for method chaining
- Internal names noticed: createProxy, ClientRequestImpl, buildSearchParams, deepMerge, replaceUrlParam, replaceUrlProtocol
- Imports or neighbors: hono.ts, types.ts, utils/cookie.ts, utils/types.ts, client/types.ts
- Plain-English summary: Runtime client implementation providing hc() helper to generate type-safe HTTP clients with method chaining
- Copy-safe detail: Creates proxy object around callback to enable fluent API, builds URL from base and path segments, handles request construction with headers, cookies, form data, and body serialization

## src/client/types.ts

- Public surface: ClientRequestOptions, ClientResponse, TypedURL, InferResponseType, InferRequestType, Client type
- Internal names noticed: BuildSearchParamsFn, Callback, CallbackOptions, BuildPath, HonoURL, ParseHostName, TrimStartSlash, TrimEndSlash, IsLiteral, ApplyParam, PickResponseByStatusCode
- Imports or neighbors: hono.ts, hono-base.ts, router/METHODS.ts, types.ts, utils/http-status.ts, utils/types.ts
- Plain-English summary: Comprehensive type definitions for typed HTTP client with URL path parameter inference and response type extraction
- Copy-safe detail: Defines client configuration options, request/response type inference utilities, URL construction helpers with parameter replacement, and typed URL generation for API client methods

## src/client/utils.ts

- Public surface: mergePath, replaceUrlParam, buildSearchParams, replaceUrlProtocol, deepMerge, parseResponse
- Internal names noticed: DetailedError, fetchRP, isObject
- Imports or neighbors: fetch-result-please.ts, client/types.ts
- Plain-English summary: Utility functions for URL manipulation, query parameter building, and request deep merging
- Copy-safe detail: Provides path merging with slash normalization, URL parameter replacement with regex, query string building, protocol swapping (http/ws), and deep object merging

## src/client/fetch-result-please.ts

- Public surface: fetchRP function, DetailedError class
- Internal names noticed: DetailedError, detectResponseType, jsonRegex, nullBodyResponses
- Imports or neighbors: none
- Plain-English summary: Response parsing utility that detects content type and extracts body, includes DetailedError for failed requests
- Copy-safe detail: Handles Promise-like and Response input, detects json vs text based on content-type header, includes null body response status codes, provides detailed error context

## src/adapter/service-worker/index.ts

- Public surface: fire function, handle export
- Internal names noticed: HandleOptions, fire, handle
- Imports or neighbors: hono.ts, types.ts, adapter/service-worker/handler.ts
- Plain-English summary: Service worker adapter entry point exposing fire() function for service worker environments
- Copy-safe detail: Wraps Hono app with service worker fetch event handling, exports handle() for direct registration and fire() for async request handling

## src/adapter/service-worker/handler.ts

- Public surface: handle function for service worker registration, HandleOptions type
- Internal names noticed: FetchEvent
- Imports or neighbors: hono.ts, types.ts, adapter/service-worker/types.ts
- Plain-English summary: Service worker event handler that wraps Hono app for fetch event processing
- Copy-safe detail: Accepts FetchEvent and options, calls app.fetch() with event request and execution context, supports optional middleware options

## src/adapter/service-worker/types.ts

- Public surface: FetchEvent interface extending ExtendableEvent
- Internal names noticed: ExtendableEvent, FetchEvent
- Imports or neighbors: none
- Plain-English summary: TypeScript definitions for service worker fetch event and extendable event interfaces
- Copy-safe detail: Minimal type definitions wrapping standard ExtendableEvent interface with service worker specific properties for request handling

## Path Inventory

- src/index.ts
- src/types.ts
- src/hono.ts
- src/hono-base.ts
- src/context.ts
- src/request.ts
- src/request/constants.ts
- src/utils/body.ts
- src/compose.ts
- src/http-exception.ts
- src/client/index.ts
- src/client/client.ts
- src/client/types.ts
- src/client/utils.ts
- src/client/fetch-result-please.ts
- src/adapter/service-worker/index.ts
- src/adapter/service-worker/handler.ts
- src/adapter/service-worker/types.ts
